steps.title: Rewrite equations with aligned coefficients
steps.content:
From $7y = -6x + 2550$, rearrange to $6x + 7y = 2550$.
Divide $24x - 28y = 1800$ by 4 to get $6x - 7y = 450$.
Both equations now have the same $x$-coefficient (6), making them easy to combine.

steps.title: Add the equations to solve for x
Subtract to find y, then compute x + y
